commissioning_settings.name: KBus update mode
commissioning_settings.description: How K-bus process data is refreshed (PFC200 G2 manual §8.9.5 Table 198). Asynchronous: K-bus runs on its own timer at the configured cycle. Synchronous: K-bus syncs to the fastest CODESYS task that touches the local bus.

commissioning_settings.name: KBus cycle time
commissioning_settings.description: Update interval for the K-bus in asynchronous update mode. Output watchdog 100 ms — modules reset to defaults if no K-bus cycle within 100 ms (PFC200 G2 manual §8.9.4).

commissioning_settings.name: KBus thread priority
commissioning_settings.description: Priority for the K-bus thread. Effective in asynchronous mode only. Manual warns: must beat IEC task priority or async mode 'freezes' (§8.9.5.1.1).

commissioning_settings.name: PLC stop behaviour
commissioning_settings.value_range: Hold last value | Set to zero
commissioning_settings.description: Response of K-bus outputs when the PLC application stops.

commissioning_settings.name: Network IP configuration
commissioning_settings.description: Eth1/Eth2 IP, netmask, gateway, DNS, switched-vs-separated mode. Set per-project; not a module-level commissioning concern but listed for completeness.

commissioning_settings.name: Web visualisation auth
commissioning_settings.description: Webvisu credentials for the controller's HMI.

monitoring_signals.name: K-bus error info
monitoring_signals.description: From mod_com.lib (CODESYS 2.x). Carries last K-bus error code + slot. Not callable in synchronous mode while a K-bus error is present (PFC200 G2 manual §8.9.5.1.2).

monitoring_signals.name: CPU load
monitoring_signals.description: From OS-level top via SSH; CODESYS task instant CPU% via runtime APIs. Watchpoint: > 70 % at idle = CPU-bound on K-bus (per the K-bus capacity page).

apply_method.notes: KBus settings persist across reboots. Some changes (cycle time, update mode) apply on next /etc/init.d/runtime restart; some (network) need a full PFC reboot.

commissioning_settings.name: Operating mode
commissioning_settings.register_or_object: R13 (extended register; exact encoding pending) — also via WAGO-I/O-CHECK Sniffer/Transparent/Mapped buttons
commissioning_settings.description: Sniffer = passive rx-only, no ACK; Transparent = active rx+tx via Mailbox 2.0; Mapped = direct cyclic byte mapping. MIAS uses Transparent for Layer-2 raw CAN.

commissioning_settings.name: CAN data format
commissioning_settings.description: Frame format. R16 + R32 must be set together to matching encoding. Mismatch with application bUse29Bit is the silent-filter trap.

commissioning_settings.name: CAN baud rate
commissioning_settings.description: Auto-baud cycles every 100 ms and locks on first cleanly-received frame. R12 holds bit-timing encoding; observed 0x1818 = 500 kbit/s.

commissioning_settings.name: Process image size
commissioning_settings.default_value: (not stated in manual; tracked as NOTIF-007 item 1)
commissioning_settings.description: Symmetric in/out PI size. Changing PI size restarts the controller. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.typConfigData.aRegister (full config struct write).

commissioning_settings.name: Mailbox length
commissioning_settings.value_range: 2 .. PI_size; manual recommends 2..6 for best throughput
commissioning_settings.description: Bytes 1..mailbox_len of PI form the Mailbox 2.0 channel. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.typConfigData.aRegister.

commissioning_settings.name: Mailbox diagnosis
commissioning_settings.description: Enables advanced mailbox diagnostics — error codes via Mailbox 0x81, classified LED on the module. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.xDiagOverMbx0Enabled.

commissioning_settings.name: Filter configuration (6 filters)
commissioning_settings.description: Each filter has [CAN ID lower limit, CAN ID upper limit, enable, FIFO policy]. FIFO policy: Keep All (default) or Overwrite. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.typConfigData.COB_ID_Filter[0..5] (array of typFilterSettings).

commissioning_settings.name: Mapped-mode output telegrams
commissioning_settings.value_range: Up to 45 output telegrams. Per telegram: CAN ID, IDE, RTR, DLC, send-group (1..8 or unassigned), send-on-change, cycle time, per-byte source.
commissioning_settings.description: Only used in Mapped mode. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.typConfigData.myTX_Mapping[0..44] (array of typMappingTxSettings).

commissioning_settings.name: Mapped-mode input mappings
commissioning_settings.description: Only used in Mapped mode. Writable from IEC via FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus.typConfigData.myRX_Mapping[0..44] (array of typMappingRxSettings).

monitoring_signals.name: Module operational state
monitoring_signals.description: Module FSM state. 20 = operational/running.

monitoring_signals.name: K-bus runnable counter
monitoring_signals.description: Increments each time the controller services this module's mailbox slot. Climbing = alive. Frozen = wedged.

monitoring_signals.name: CAN bus-off events
monitoring_signals.description: Counter of CAN bus-off events.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: CAN warning events
monitoring_signals.description: Counter of CAN bus warning events.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: CAN RX errors
monitoring_signals.description: Counter of CAN RX errors.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: CAN TX errors
monitoring_signals.description: Counter of CAN TX errors.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: Layer-2 RX errors
monitoring_signals.description: L2-specific RX error counter.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: Layer-2 TX errors
monitoring_signals.description: L2-specific TX error counter.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: Bus diagnosis
monitoring_signals.description: Bit-flag set; 0 = OK.

alarms.message_template: {tag}: {name} non-zero ({value}) — bus or module fault. Project should override setpoint and delay per tolerance.

monitoring_signals.name: Actual baudrate (silicon)
monitoring_signals.description: Encoded baud index from WagoTypesModule_75x_658.eBitrate.

monitoring_signals.name: Actual operating mode (silicon)
monitoring_signals.description: Encoded operating mode.

monitoring_signals.name: Frame format mode (silicon)
monitoring_signals.description: TRUE = 29-bit Extended mode active. FALSE = 11-bit Standard. Read this to verify mode after commissioning.

monitoring_signals.name: Module FW revision
monitoring_signals.description: Module firmware revision. -1 = not yet read.

monitoring_signals.name: PI status byte (PI byte 0 input)
monitoring_signals.process_image_bit: Bit 5 = GEN_ERR, Bit 4 = CAN_ERR, Bit 3 = TX_OVF, Bit 2 = RX_OVF, Bit 1 = INT_ERR
monitoring_signals.description: Per-cycle status byte. GEN_ERR aggregates the others. INT_ERR causes: 24V missing / mailbox-PD inconsistency / parameterization fault / register fault.

monitoring_signals.name: Mailbox 0x81 diagnostic event stream
monitoring_signals.description: Event/error codes (3E8..3FB CAN-side, 7D0..7DB internal, BB8..BD7 mailbox parameterization) classified Notification/Warning/Error with appears/disappears mode.

commissioning_constraints.rule: Module's R16+R32 frame-format setting MUST match the application's FbCanL2Open.bUse29Bit input and the Rx/Tx FB family.
commissioning_constraints.violation_consequence: Silent filter trap — frames are filtered at the silicon and never reach CODESYS.

commissioning_constraints.rule: R16 and R32 are paired; both must be set to matching encoding.
Available CAN user-data bytes per direction = PI_size − 1 (status) − mailbox_len − 1 (toggle, Mapped only). Mapping configurations exceeding this fail.
commissioning_constraints.violation_consequence: Configuration write rejected; mapped data not visible in PI.

apply_method.notes: FbModuleConfigurationAndStatus exposes the FULL module config via the typConfigData : typFullConfiguration INOUT — aRegister[*] for all registers (PI size, baud, mailbox length, etc.), COB_ID_Filter[0..5] for filters, myTX_Mapping[0..44] / myRX_Mapping[0..44] for mapped output/input tables, plus eBitrate/eMode/x29BitEnabled/xSdoEnabled/xDiagOverMbx0Enabled discrete pins. The IEC commissioner writes the full struct then issues xExecute + xWriteRead=TRUE + xSaveValues=TRUE to commit to EEPROM. MIAS does not run WAGO-I/O-CHECK in production — every parameter is set from IEC. WAGO-I/O-CHECK listed as a fallback channel only. EEPROM-saved values typically take effect on the next module re-init; FB-driven writes that re-issue Open also re-init the silicon, so a runtime-restart is not strictly required for FB-driven changes (versus the NOTIF-010 case which was about EEPROM-saved-but-not-yet-loaded values from a separate WAGO-I/O-CHECK session).

commissioning_settings.name: Operating mode
commissioning_settings.mias_convention_value: RS-485 (typical, e.g. for DEIF MIC-2 MKII Modbus RTU)
commissioning_settings.description: Selects the serial physical layer mode.

commissioning_settings.name: Process image size
commissioning_settings.description: Symmetric in/out. DMX-receive forces 24 bytes.

commissioning_settings.name: Baud rate
commissioning_settings.description: Serial baud rate. RS-485 multidrop; max 1000 m / 32 nodes per segment.

commissioning_settings.name: Data bits / parity / stop bits
commissioning_settings.description: Serial framing parameters.

monitoring_signals.name: Status byte error flags
monitoring_signals.description: Per-cycle status byte error bits.

apply_method.notes: Same constraint as 750-658 — full PFC reboot required for EEPROM config to land in silicon.
Passive K-bus terminator. No configuration. Mias-core commissioning function should skip this module type entirely.

commissioning_settings.name: Sensor type per channel
commissioning_settings.value_range: Pt100 (default) | Pt200 | Pt500 | Pt1000 | Ni100 | Ni120 | Ni1000 (TK6180 + TK5000) | Potentiometer 10R..1k2 | Potentiometer 10R..5k0
commissioning_settings.description: 8-channel resistance/RTD module. Per-channel sensor type configured via WAGO-I/O-CHECK / CODESYS Library / e!COCKPIT. Module auto-linearises the temperature range. Resolution: 0.1 °C overall, 0.01 °C in -50..150 °C window for Pt1000/Ni1000.

commissioning_settings.name: Connection type
commissioning_settings.description: 750-451 supports 2-wire connection only on this 8-channel variant. 3-/4-wire RTD requires the 4-channel sibling 750-460/468 family.

commissioning_settings.name: Channel deactivation
commissioning_settings.description: Per-channel enable/disable. Unused channels can be deactivated to suppress wire-break LED.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel sensor error
monitoring_signals.description: Sensor error (short circuit, wire break, or out-of-measurement-range) is indicated by the per-channel red LED (LED 9-16) and reflected in the per-channel control/status byte (8 x 8-bit control/status optional in PI).

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel measured value
monitoring_signals.description: 16-bit per-channel measured value (8 x 16-bit data in PI). Conversion time ~100 ms typical, response time max 3 s. Measurement error ±0.6 K (Pt100/Pt200/Pt500/Ni100/Ni120), ±0.2 K (Pt1000/Ni1000), ±0.3 Ω resistance.

apply_method.notes: Sensor-type config persists in module EEPROM; PFC reboot needed for new sensor-type config to take effect.

manual_section_refs: Datasheet Page 1-2 (Technical data, Sensor types, Configuration options)

commissioning_settings.name: Signal range per channel
commissioning_settings.description: 8-channel current input. Per-channel signal range. The 3.6..21 mA Namur NE43 range provides standardized wire-break / out-of-range signaling.

commissioning_settings.name: Channel deactivation
commissioning_settings.description: Per-channel enable/disable. Unused channels can be deactivated to suppress error LED.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel error indication
monitoring_signals.description: Wire break, short circuit, or out-of-measurement-range is indicated by the per-channel red LED (LED 9-16) and reflected in the per-channel control/status byte. 4..20 mA mode provides wire-break detect (current < 3.6 mA = open).

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel measured value
monitoring_signals.description: 16-bit per-channel measured value (8 x 16-bit data in PI). 12-bit resolution. Conversion time 10 ms typical. Measurement error 0.1% of upper-range value at 25 °C; temp drift 0.01%/K. Module provides 24 V to 2-wire sensors directly.

commissioning_settings.name: Signal range
commissioning_settings.value_range: 0..20 mA (only — per datasheet 'Signal type (current): 0 … 20 mADC'; this variant does NOT support 4..20 mA — use 750-554 for 4..20 mA output)
commissioning_settings.description: 4-channel current output, fixed range. Manual mentions 'Start of measurement range' field — likely a per-channel scaling start (e.g. enter 4 mA to map raw 0..32767 → 4..20 mA at the application boundary).

commissioning_settings.name: Start of measurement range (per channel scaling)
commissioning_settings.value_range: depends on physical range — manual cites '4 mA' as an example
commissioning_settings.description: Per-channel range start for the value-to-current mapping. Useful when the application's REAL value should map starting at 4 mA rather than 0.

commissioning_settings.name: End of measurement range (per channel scaling)
commissioning_settings.description: Companion to start-of-range; defines the upper end of the application-to-current mapping.

commissioning_settings.name: Replacement value on PLC stop
commissioning_settings.description: Per-channel value to drive when PLC stops or comms is lost. Standard WAGO AO behaviour.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel error
monitoring_signals.description: Red LED (LED B) per channel + control/status byte bit indicates output error (open circuit / short / load impedance fault). Load impedance must be 0..300 Ω OR 300..600 Ω (same for all channels).

commissioning_constraints.rule: Per datasheet: load impedance is 0..300 Ω OR 300..600 Ω, with the same range for all 4 channels. Mixing high-impedance and low-impedance loads on the same module is not supported.
commissioning_constraints.violation_consequence: Output error on the mismatched channel; reduced output range.

manual_section_refs: Manual configuration section ("Start of measurement range" / "4 mA" example)

commissioning_settings.name: Signal range
commissioning_settings.value_range: 0..30 V DC (only — fixed range on this variant)
commissioning_settings.description: 2-channel differential voltage input, fixed range. 14-bit resolution; admissible continuous overload 60 V; LSB = 1.8 mV. Sampling: 5 µs per sample, 1 ms sampling repetition time, 1 ms module-level sampling delay.

commissioning_settings.name: Operating mode
commissioning_settings.value_range: Continuously sampling (default) — verify whether other modes exist via WAGO-I/O-CHECK
commissioning_settings.description: Per datasheet: operating mode is 'Continuously sampling (default)'. SAR (Successive Approximation Register) conversion. Internal RC filter 1st-order with fG = 5 kHz.

monitoring_signals.name: Measurement range overflow/underflow
monitoring_signals.description: Indicated via status byte AND per-channel red LED (LED B, D = error AI 1, AI 2). Differential signal; isolation 500 V system/field OR channel/channel.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel measured value
monitoring_signals.description: 16-bit per-channel data (2 x 16-bit data + optional 2 x 8-bit control/status). 14-bit effective resolution. Measurement error 0.05% upper-range at 25 °C, ≤0.4% over full temp range, 0.01%/K drift. Crosstalk attenuation 80 dB. Internal resistance 1000 kΩ.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel signal state
monitoring_signals.description: 16 channels × 1-bit signal state in PI input. Green LED 1-16 indicates state. High-side switching; voltage range: signal(0) -3..+5 V DC; signal(1) 15..30 V DC.

apply_method.notes: Hardware-fixed 3 ms input filter (debounce). No configurable parameters on this 750-1405 variant — different SKU suffixes (e.g. 750-1405/000-040) may have different filter times. Module is essentially plug-and-play; mias-core commissioning function should skip it.

commissioning_settings.name: Replacement value on PLC stop
commissioning_settings.description: Per-channel safe-state value when PLC stops or comms is lost. Configurable on most WAGO digital output modules via WAGO-I/O-CHECK Configuration dialog. Datasheet doesn't explicitly cite this for 750-1504 — verify against the WAGO-I/O-CHECK dialog presented for this slot.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel signal state
monitoring_signals.description: 16 channels × 1-bit output state echoed in PI. Green LED 1-16 indicates state. Output 0.5 A short-circuit-protected; resistive/inductive/lamp loads; max switching frequency 1 kHz.

apply_method.notes: Replacement-value config is module-EEPROM-stored where supported.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel diagnostic bit (DIAG 1, DIAG 2)
monitoring_signals.process_image_bit: PI input bit 0 = DIAG 1, bit 1 = DIAG 2
monitoring_signals.description: Per-channel error flag in PI input. 0 = normal operation; 1 = error on the channel: open circuit (no load) / short circuit to ground / short circuit to +24 V / overtemperature on overload. Auto-resets when fault clears. Output current 2 A per channel; short-circuit limited to 15 A typ.; reverse voltage protected; open-circuit detect threshold 0.2 mA.

monitoring_signals.name: Per-channel signal state
monitoring_signals.description: PI output bit 0 = DO 1 setpoint, bit 1 = DO 2 setpoint. Output 'follows the output bit' in normal operation. On short circuit to ground or overload, output silently changes to 0 and back to 1 once fault clears.

apply_method.notes: Diagnostics are always-on; no enable/disable setting. PI is fixed shape (2 output bits + 2 input diagnostic bits). No commissioning function action needed beyond detecting it on the K-bus chain. NOTE: when used as replacement for older 750-507, additional considerations apply per manual §7.1.

commissioning_settings.name: IP addressing mode
commissioning_settings.value_range: DHCP | BootP | static (configured by DIP switch + WBM)
commissioning_settings.description: DIP switch on the front configures last byte of the IP address; full IP/netmask/gateway via WBM (Web-Based Management).

commissioning_settings.name: IP address / netmask / gateway / DNS
commissioning_settings.description: Static IP config when not using DHCP/BootP. LasseMaja D03 carrier sits at 192.168.1.12.

commissioning_settings.name: Modbus unit identifier (node address)
commissioning_settings.description: Modbus TCP unit ID. LasseMaja D03 is node 2.

commissioning_settings.name: Watchdog / connection timeout
commissioning_settings.description: Modbus connection watchdog — reset outputs to safe state if no Modbus master communication within timeout.

commissioning_settings.name: Process image size (max)
commissioning_settings.value_range: Up to 1020 input words / 1020 output words
commissioning_settings.description: Coupler aggregates K-bus modules into a Modbus-accessible PI. Max 250 modules per node (64 without bus extension).

monitoring_signals.name: Network connection / Link / Activity
monitoring_signals.description: LED LINK/ACT green per port (2 ports, integrated switch). Visible front-panel only — also reportable via SNMP if enabled.

monitoring_signals.name: Module status (MS) / Network status (NS)
monitoring_signals.description: LED MS / NS red/green — controller state and network state. Standard CIP/Modbus indicators.

monitoring_signals.name: Local I/O bus status
monitoring_signals.description: LED I/O red/green/orange — K-bus health. Red = fault on K-bus.

apply_method.notes: 750-362 is itself a fieldbus coupler with its own bootloader — most config persists in the coupler's flash; IP changes typically apply on its own reboot, not the host PFC.

monitoring_signals.name: System supply voltage status
monitoring_signals.description: LED A green = system supply OK. LED B green = power-jumper-contact field supply OK. No K-bus diagnostic surface — front-panel LEDs only.

apply_method.notes: Internal system supply module that adds 2 A to the K-bus 5 V capacity. Pure passive — no commissioning. Total current 2 A; field-side 24 V passes through to neighbouring power jumper contacts.

monitoring_signals.name: Field supply status
monitoring_signals.description: LED B green = field supply OK. No K-bus side diagnostic surface.

apply_method.notes: Pure passive filter module — protects field-side 24 V supply against transient overvoltages caused by inductive loads. Marine-certified (Germanischer Lloyd / Lloyd's Register). Use in conjunction with Ex i supply module + 750 PROFIsafe modules. No commissioning.

monitoring_signals.name: System and field supply status
monitoring_signals.description: LED A green = system supply OK; LED B green = field supply (power jumper contacts) OK.

apply_method.notes: Pure passive filter module with surge suppression on the system-side 24 V supply. High-isolation versions (suffix /020-002 used in LasseMaja) are streamlined for systems with insulation monitoring. External fuses required (2 A slow-blow for system supply, 10 A for jumper contacts). No commissioning.

Passive 16-way 24 V potential distribution module — provides 24 V to 16 push-in CAGE CLAMP terminals from the upstream module's power jumper contacts. Pairs typically with 750-1405/750-1406 16-channel digital inputs to eliminate DIN-rail terminal blocks for field wiring. Pure passive — no K-bus side at all (no data contacts).

Passive 8-way 24 V / 8-way 0 V potential distribution module — provides 8 × 24 V + 8 × 0 V to push-in CAGE CLAMP terminals. Pairs typically with 750-1506 8-channel I/O modules. Pure passive — no K-bus side.

monitoring_signals.name: DC OK output contact
monitoring_signals.description: Hardwired DC OK signal output indicating output voltage is within range. Wire to a digital input module if PLC monitoring is required. Not on K-bus.

apply_method.notes: DC/DC converter, 6 mm housing, 24 V DC input → 5 V DC output, 0.5 A / 2.5 W. Input range 10..30 V. Common with 857 / 2857 series. No K-bus interface — pure power supply. DC OK contact is a hardwired digital output suitable for monitoring via a digital-input module.

Pre-configured isolation amplifier — current input 0..20 mA / 4..20 mA → current output 0..20 mA. 3-way electrical isolation, 3 kV test voltage. 24 V DC supply. No K-bus interface — standalone signal conditioner. Per datasheet: 'Configuration options: Pre-configured' — fixed function, no commissioning.
